projects.name: E-commerce checkout API modernization
responsibilities: Owned the payments and checkout domain API
Partnered with product and fraud teams on risk rules and retries
Ran incident reviews and drove SLO dashboards with the SRE team

metricsVerified: Cut p95 checkout latency from 820ms to 410ms over 6 months (APM)
Reduced payment failure rate from 4.2% to 2.1% after retry and idempotency fixes
impact.narrative: Stabilized peak-traffic checkout by tightening idempotency keys, improving observability, and refactoring hot paths.

projects.name: Search relevance and ranking service
responsibilities: Maintained the search indexing pipeline and ranking experiments
Collaborated with ML engineers on feature stores for ranking signals
Defined success metrics with PMs (CTR, add-to-cart rate)

metricsVerified: Improved top-3 click-through rate by 12% in A/B tests (8-week experiment)
impact.narrative: Shipped iterative ranking improvements with guardrails and offline evaluation before rollout.

projects.name: Mobile offline sync and conflict resolution
responsibilities: Designed conflict resolution for offline-first mobile clients
Worked closely with mobile engineers on sync protocols and UX edge cases
Authored RFCs for versioning and migration of local schemas

metricsVerified: Lowered sync-related support tickets by 23% quarter over quarter
impact.narrative: Made offline workflows predictable by clarifying merge rules and adding telemetry for conflict rates.

projects.name: Analytics event pipeline (batch + streaming)
responsibilities: Owned core event quality checks and late-arriving data handling
Partnered with analysts on dimensional models for self-serve reporting
On-call rotation for pipeline failures and backfills

metricsVerified: Recovered 99.7% of daily volume within SLA after upstream schema drift
Cut average dbt run time by 18% via incremental model refactors
impact.narrative: Improved trust in downstream metrics by tightening contracts and anomaly alerts.

projects.name: Internal admin portal for operations
responsibilities: Built workflows for ops teams to manage refunds and manual overrides
Implemented role-based access and audit logs
Gathered feedback through weekly sessions with support leads

metricsVerified: Reduced average handling time for tier-2 tickets by 15% (support analytics)
impact.narrative: Reduced toil by replacing ad-hoc scripts with a guided, audited UI.
